mapper.select: select count(*) from DP_TABLE_ORGANIZATION_ASSETS t where statistics_time >= date(now())

select NAME, case when cast(USED_CAPACITY as decimal) > 0 and cast(USED_CAPACITY as decimal) < 0.01 then 0.01 else cast(round(USED_CAPACITY, 2) as decimal) end as usedCapacity, cast(round(BARE_CAPACITY, 2) as decimal) as bareCapacity, TABLE_COUNT as tableCount, LIVE_TABLE_ROTE as liveTableRote, TABLE_SUM as tableSum from DP_DB_STATE
mapper.insert:
insert into DP_DB_STATE (NAME, USED_CAPACITY, BARE_CAPACITY, TABLE_COUNT, LIVE_TABLE_ROTE, MODIFY_TIME, TABLE_SUM ) values
( #{item.name,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.usedCapacity,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.bareCapacity,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.tableCount,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.liveTableRote,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, now(), #{item.tableSum,jdbcType=VARCHAR} )
mapper.select: select concat(t1.usedtablecount,'/',t2.alltablecount) as oneCount from ( select count(distinct concat(TABLE_PROJECT,TABLE_NAME_EN )) as usedtablecount from DP_TABLE_ORGANIZATION_ASSETS where statistics_time >= date(now()) and livetype = 'LIVING' and upper(TABLE_TYPE) ='ODPS') t1 left join( select count(distinct concat(TABLE_PROJECT,TABLE_NAME_EN )) as alltablecount from DP_TABLE_ORGANIZATION_ASSETS where statistics_time >= date(now()) and upper(TABLE_TYPE) ='ODPS' ) t2 on 1=1

SELECT tabletype as tableType, dataid as resourceId, ROUND(SUM(totalCount) / 100000000, 2) AS totalCount FROM (SELECT CASE WHEN tabletype = 1 THEN 'ODPS' WHEN tabletype = 2 THEN 'ADS' WHEN tabletype = 3 THEN 'ADS' WHEN tabletype = 21 then 'ADS' WHEN tabletype = 22 then 'ADB' WHEN tabletype = 4 THEN 'HBASE' WHEN tabletype = 5 THEN 'HIVE' WHEN tabletype = 6 THEN 'ES' WHEN tabletype = 7 THEN 'CLICKHOUSE' WHEN tabletype = 10 THEN 'ORACLE' WHEN tabletype = 12 THEN 'CDH-HIVE' END AS tabletype, dataid, SUM(tableallcount) AS totalCount FROM (SELECT tableproject, tablename, dataid, tabletype, MAX(tableallcount) AS tableallcount, MAX(partitiondate) AS partitiondate FROM synlte.syndmg_table_all WHERE DATE_FORMAT(STR_TO_DATE(INSERTEDDATATIME, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s'), '%Y%m%d') = DATE_FORMAT(CURDATE(), '%Y%m%d') GROUP BY tableproject, tablename, tabletype, dataid) t GROUP BY tabletype, dataid) sub WHERE tabletype IS NOT NULL GROUP BY tabletype, dataid ORDER BY tabletype DESC

select NAME, case when file_count is null then 0 when round(file_count / 100000000, 2) > 0 and round(file_count / 100000000, 2) < 0.01 then 0.01 else round(file_count / 100000000, 2) end as FILECOUNT from DP_T_ADS_ODPS

select upper(SYS_NAME)as name, round(ceil(USE_SIZE)/1024,0) as USED_CAPACITY, round(ceil(TOTAL_SIZE)/1024,0) as BARE_CAPACITY from (select SYS_NAME,USE_SIZE,TOTAL_SIZE from SYNITIL.PANGU where upper(SYS_NAME) = 'ODPS' order by time desc) t where row_number() over (order by time desc) = 1 union all select upper(SYS_NAME)as name, round(ceil(USE_SIZE)/1024,0) as USED_CAPACITY, round(ceil(TOTAL_SIZE)/1024,0) as BARE_CAPACITY from (select SYS_NAME,USE_SIZE,TOTAL_SIZE from SYNITIL.PANGU where upper(SYS_NAME) = 'ADS' order by time desc) t where row_number() over (order by time desc) = 1

select t.name, case when t.USED_CAPACITY is null then 0 else t.USED_CAPACITY end as USED_CAPACITY, case when t.BARE_CAPACITY is null then 0 else t.BARE_CAPACITY end as BARE_CAPACITY from (select name, round(ceil(USED_CAPACITY), 2) as USED_CAPACITY, round(ceil(BARE_CAPACITY), 2) as BARE_CAPACITY, row_number() over(PARTITION BY upper(name) ORDER BY UT DESC) as rnn from DP_T_ADS_ODPS where upper(name) in ('ADS', 'ODPS', 'OSS', 'DATAHUB')) t where t.rnn = 1

select max(CAST(case when type = 'dataQualityAllTablesSum' then oneCount else 0 end AS UNSIGNED)) as dataQualityAllTablesSum, max(CAST(case when type = 'dataQualityAllColumnsSum' then oneCount else 0 end AS UNSIGNED)) as dataQualityAllColumnsSum, cast(max(case when type = 'liveTableRote' then oneCount else 0 end) as decimal(10,2)) as liveTableRote, max(CAST(case when type = 'abnormalModelsSum' then oneCount else 0 end AS UNSIGNED)) as abnormalModelsSum, max(CAST(case when type = 'dataAbnormalTablesSum' then oneCount else 0 end AS UNSIGNED)) as dataAbnormalTablesSum, max(CAST(case when type = 'nationalStandardTablesSum' then oneCount else 0 end AS UNSIGNED)) as nationalStandardTablesSum, max(CAST(case when type = 'delayTablesSum' then oneCount else 0 end AS UNSIGNED)) as delayTablesSum, max(CAST(case when type = 'abnormalDataFlowsSum' then oneCount else 0 end AS UNSIGNED)) as abnormalDataFlowsSum, max(CAST(case when type = 'abnormalBillsSum' then oneCount else 0 end AS UNSIGNED)) as abnormalBillsSum, max(CAST(case when type = 'landMarkTablesSum' then oneCount else 0 end AS UNSIGNED)) as landMarkTablesSum from ( select 'dataQualityAllTablesSum' as type, count(*) as oneCount from dqc_task_config union all select 'dataQualityAllColumnsSum' as type , count(*) as oneCount from dqc_rule_info union ALL select 'liveTableRote' as type,case when t2.alltablecount = 0 then 0 else round(t1.usedtablecount/t2.alltablecount,4)*100 end as oneCount from ( select count(distinct concat(TABLE_PROJECT,TABLE_NAME_EN )) as usedtablecount from DP_TABLE_ORGANIZATION_ASSETS where STATISTICS_TIME >= date(NOW()) - INTERVAL #{daysAgo} DAY and STATISTICS_TIME < date(NOW()) + interval 1 day - interval #{daysAgo} DAY and livetype = 'LIVING') t1 left join( select count(distinct concat(TABLE_PROJECT,TABLE_NAME_EN )) as alltablecount from DP_TABLE_ORGANIZATION_ASSETS where statistics_time >= date(now()) and upper(TABLE_TYPE) ='ODPS') t2 on 1=1 union ALL
select 'abnormalModelsSum' as type, count(status) as oneCount from dbr_workflow_instance where status = '运行失败'
and project_name in
lower(#{item})
select 'abnormalModelsSum' as type, count(status) as oneCount from dbr_workflow_instance where status = '运行失败'
and project_name in
lower(#{item})
union ALL select 'nationalStandardTablesSum' as type , count(codeid) as oneCount from SYNLTE.FIELDCODE where deleted = 0 union ALL select 'landMarkTablesSum' as type , count(distinct t.dmzd) as oneCount from DSM_DD_BDDM t ) tt

select name, sum(tableSum) as tableSum from ( select upper(table_type) as name, count(*) as tableSum from DP_TABLE_ORGANIZATION_ASSETS where STATISTICS_TIME >= date(now() - interval #{daysAgo} day) and table_type is not null group by table_type ) t group by name

select DATABASE_TYPE as dataBaseType , PROJECT_NAME as projectName , TABLENAME_EN as tableNameEN , TABLENAME_CH as tableNameCH,PARTITIONED as partitioned,DATA_SOURCE_NAME as dataSourceName, DATA_SOURCE_ID as dataSourceId,DATA_CENTER_NAME as dataCenterName,DATA_CENTER_ID as dataCenterId, ISSTANDARD as isStandard,ISADDMONITOR as isAddMonitor,ISDELETE as isDelete, PARTITION_COLUMN as partitionColumn ,table_id as tableUuid from DP_DATA_STORAGE_ADD_TABLE where ISDELETE = '0' and ISADDMONITOR = '已控'

select DATABASE_TYPE as dataBaseType , PROJECT_NAME as projectName , TABLENAME_EN as tableNameEN , TABLENAME_CH as tableNameCH,PARTITIONED as partitioned,DATA_SOURCE_NAME as dataSourceName, DATA_SOURCE_ID as dataSourceId,DATA_CENTER_NAME as dataCenterName,DATA_CENTER_ID as dataCenterId, ISSTANDARD as isStandard,ISADDMONITOR as isAddMonitor,ISDELETE as isDelete, PARTITION_COLUMN as partitionColumn ,table_id as tableUuid from DP_DATA_STORAGE_ADD_TABLE where ISADDMONITOR = '待控' and ISSTANDARD = '0'

select distinct (project_name || '.' || tablename_en) as tableNameEn,tablename_ch as tableNameCh, case when table_today_sum is null then 0 else table_today_sum end as tableTodaySum, case when table_all_sum is null then 0 else table_all_sum end as tableAllSum from DP_DATA_STORAGE_ADD_TABLE t1 left join (select a.table_project, a.TABLE_NAME_EN, case when a.table_today_sum - b.table_today_sum < 0 then 0 else a.table_today_sum - b.table_today_sum end as table_today_sum, a.table_all_sum from (select * from DP_DATA_STORAGE_TABLE_FULL where substr(statistic_day, 1, 8) = #{dt}) a left join (select table_project,TABLE_NAME_EN,table_today_sum,table_all_sum from DP_DATA_STORAGE_TABLE_FULL where substr(statistic_day, 1, 8) = #{yesToday}) b on a.TABLE_NAME_EN = b.TABLE_NAME_EN) t2 on upper(t1.project_name) = upper(t2.table_project) and upper(t1.tablename_en) = upper(t2.TABLE_NAME_EN) where t1.ISDELETE = '0' and t1.ISADDMONITOR = '已控'

select.if:
select case when a.value is null then 'null' else a.value end as value, case when a.label is null then '中间表(0)' when b.label is null then a.label||'(0)' else b.label end as label from ( select distinct c.CODEID as value ,c.CODETEXT as label,d.primaryLabel from V_CLASSIFY_INFO c right join (select distinct CODEID, CODETEXT as primaryLabel from V_CLASSIFY_INFO where CODEID = #{primaryClassifyCode} and PARCODEID is not null )d on c.PARCODEID = d.CODEID order by value) a left join
(SELECT
SECONDARY_ORGANIZATION_CH||'('||count(1)||')' as label,SECONDARY_ORGANIZATION_CH as value, PRIMARY_ORGANIZATION_CH as primaryLabel
SECONDARY_DATASOURCE_CH||'('||count(1)||')' as label,SECONDARY_DATASOURCE_CH as value, PRIMARY_DATASOURCE_CH as primaryLabel
FROM ( SELECT
j.SECONDARY_ORGANIZATION_CH,j.PRIMARY_ORGANIZATION_CH
j.SECONDARY_DATASOURCE_CH,j.PRIMARY_DATASOURCE_CH
, row_number ( ) over ( PARTITION BY lower(TABLE_PROJECT), upper(TABLE_NAME_EN) ORDER BY STATISTICS_TIME DESC ) as rnn from DP_TABLE_ORGANIZATION_ASSETS j where STATISTICS_TIME >= date(now() - interval #{daysAgo} day) ) h WHERE h.rnn = 1 group by
SECONDARY_ORGANIZATION_CH,PRIMARY_ORGANIZATION_CH
SECONDARY_DATASOURCE_CH,PRIMARY_DATASOURCE_CH
) b
(SELECT
THREELEVEL_ORGANIZATION_CH||'('||count(1)||')' as label,THREELEVEL_ORGANIZATION_CH as value, SECONDARY_ORGANIZATION_CH as primaryLabel
SECONDARY_DATASOURCE_CH||'('||count(1)||')' as label,SECONDARY_DATASOURCE_CH as value, PRIMARY_DATASOURCE_CH as primaryLabel
FROM ( SELECT
j.THREELEVEL_ORGANIZATION_CH,j.SECONDARY_ORGANIZATION_CH,j.PRIMARY_ORGANIZATION_CH
j.SECONDARY_DATASOURCE_CH,j.PRIMARY_DATASOURCE_CH
, row_number ( ) over ( PARTITION BY lower(TABLE_PROJECT), upper(TABLE_NAME_EN) ORDER BY STATISTICS_TIME DESC ) as rnn from DP_TABLE_ORGANIZATION_ASSETS j where STATISTICS_TIME >= date(now() - interval #{daysAgo} day) ) h WHERE h.rnn = 1 group by
THREELEVEL_ORGANIZATION_CH,SECONDARY_ORGANIZATION_CH,PRIMARY_ORGANIZATION_CH
SECONDARY_DATASOURCE_CH,PRIMARY_DATASOURCE_CH
) b
on a.label COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci = b.value COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci and a.primaryLabel COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci = b.primaryLabel COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci

if.if: SELECT '中间表' || '(' || count(1) || ')' AS label, '' AS VALUE FROM (SELECT j.PRIMARY_DATASOURCE_CH, j.SECONDARY_DATASOURCE_CH, row_number() over(PARTITION BY lower(TABLE_PROJECT), upper(TABLE_NAME_EN) ORDER BY STATISTICS_TIME DESC) AS rnn FROM DP_TABLE_ORGANIZATION_ASSETS j where STATISTICS_TIME >= date(now()) ) h WHERE h.rnn = 1 and PRIMARY_DATASOURCE_CH = '中间表' GROUP BY SECONDARY_DATASOURCE_CH, PRIMARY_DATASOURCE_CH

SELECT '中间表' || '(' || count(1) || ')' AS label, '' AS VALUE FROM (SELECT j.PRIMARY_ORGANIZATION_CH, j.SECONDARY_ORGANIZATION_CH, row_number() over(PARTITION BY lower(TABLE_PROJECT), upper(TABLE_NAME_EN) ORDER BY STATISTICS_TIME DESC) AS rnn FROM DP_TABLE_ORGANIZATION_ASSETS j where STATISTICS_TIME >= date(now()) ) h WHERE h.rnn = 1 and PRIMARY_ORGANIZATION_CH = '中间表' GROUP BY SECONDARY_ORGANIZATION_CH, PRIMARY_ORGANIZATION_CH

select.if:
SELECT primaryClassifyCh, CASE WHEN (primaryClassifyCh IS NULL AND secondaryClassifyCh IS NOT NULL) THEN '汇总' WHEN (primaryClassifyCh IS NOT NULL AND secondaryClassifyCh IS NULL) THEN '合计' ELSE secondaryClassifyCh END AS secondaryClassifyCh, SUM(tableAllSum) AS tableAllSum, SUM(tableAllSize) AS tableAllSize, SUM(averageAllDailyVolume) AS averageAllDailyVolume, SUM(tableNumberSum) AS tableNumberSum, SUM(yesterdayAllSum) AS yesterdayAllSum, SUM(adsSum) AS adsSum, SUM(odpsSum) AS odpsSum, SUM(adsSize) AS adsSize, SUM(odpsSize) AS odpsSize, SUM(averageAllDailySize) AS averageAllDailySize FROM ( SELECT mainClassify, IFNULL(primaryClassifyCh, '中间表') AS primaryClassifyCh, IFNULL(secondaryClassifyCh, '中间表') AS secondaryClassifyCh, tableAllSum, tableAllSize, averageAllDailyVolume, tableNumberSum, yesterdayAllSum, Statistics_Day, todayStr, adsSum, odpsSum, adsSize, odpsSize, averageAllDailySize FROM ( SELECT 'dataResourceClassify' AS mainClassify, FACTOR_ONE_NAME AS primaryClassifyCh, FACTOR_TWO_NAME AS secondaryClassifyCh, SUM(table_all_count) AS tableAllSum, TRUNCATE(SUM(table_size) / 1073741824, 4) AS tableAllSize, SUM(YESTERDAY_COUNT) AS yesterdayAllSum, SUM(AVERAGE_DAILY_VOLUME) / COUNT(*) AS averageAllDailyVolume, COUNT(*) AS tableNumberSum, DATE_FORMAT(STATISTICS_TIME, '%Y%m%d') AS Statistics_Day, DATE_FORMAT(NOW(), '%Y%m%d') AS todayStr, SUM(CASE WHEN UPPER(table_type) = 'ADS' THEN table_all_count ELSE 0 END) AS adsSum, SUM(CASE WHEN UPPER(table_type) = 'ODPS' THEN table_all_count ELSE 0 END) AS odpsSum, TRUNCATE(SUM(CASE WHEN UPPER(table_type) = 'ADS' THEN table_size ELSE 0 END) / 1073741824, 4) AS adsSize, TRUNCATE(SUM(CASE WHEN UPPER(table_type) = 'ODPS' THEN table_size ELSE 0 END) / 1073741824, 4) AS odpsSize, CASE WHEN (SUM(CASE WHEN AVERAGE_DAILY_SIZE IS NULL THEN 0 ELSE AVERAGE_DAILY_SIZE END) / COUNT(*)) IS NULL THEN 0 WHEN (SUM(CASE WHEN AVERAGE_DAILY_SIZE IS NULL THEN 0 ELSE AVERAGE_DAILY_SIZE END) / COUNT(*)) / 1073741824 > 0 AND (SUM(CASE WHEN AVERAGE_DAILY_SIZE IS NULL THEN 0 ELSE AVERAGE_DAILY_SIZE END) / COUNT(*)) / 1073741824 < 0.01 THEN 0.01 ELSE TRUNCATE((SUM(CASE WHEN AVERAGE_DAILY_SIZE IS NULL THEN 0 ELSE AVERAGE_DAILY_SIZE END) / COUNT(*)) / 1073741824, 2) END AS averageAllDailySize FROM ( SELECT * FROM ( SELECT j.*, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY LOWER(TABLE_PROJECT), UPPER(TABLE_NAME_EN) ORDER BY STATISTICS_TIME DESC) AS rnn FROM DP_TABLE_ORGANIZATION_ASSETS j WHERE STATISTICS_TIME >= DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 0 DAY) ) h WHERE h.rnn = 1 ) t11
FACTOR_ONE_NAME = #{primaryClassifyCh}
AND FACTOR_TWO_NAME = #{secondaryClassifyCh}
AND FACTOR_ONE_NAME IS NULL
AND FACTOR_TWO_NAME IS NULL
GROUP BY FACTOR_ONE_NAME, FACTOR_TWO_NAME, DATE_FORMAT(STATISTICS_TIME, '%Y%m%d') ) t12 ) t13 GROUP BY ROLLUP(primaryClassifyCh, secondaryClassifyCh) HAVING CONCAT(primaryClassifyCh, secondaryClassifyCh) != '中间表' AND primaryClassifyCh IS NOT NULL AND ( CASE WHEN (primaryClassifyCh IS NULL AND secondaryClassifyCh IS NOT NULL) THEN '汇总' WHEN (primaryClassifyCh IS NOT NULL AND secondaryClassifyCh IS NULL) THEN '合计' ELSE secondaryClassifyCh END IS NOT NULL )
AND (primaryClassifyCh IS NULL AND secondaryClassifyCh IS NOT NULL)

SELECT primaryClassifyCh, CASE WHEN (primaryClassifyCh IS NULL AND secondaryClassifyCh IS NOT NULL) THEN '汇总' WHEN (primaryClassifyCh IS NOT NULL AND secondaryClassifyCh IS NULL) THEN '合计' ELSE secondaryClassifyCh END AS secondaryClassifyCh, SUM(tableAllSum) AS tableAllSum, SUM(tableAllSize) AS tableAllSize, SUM(averageAllDailyVolume) AS averageAllDailyVolume, SUM(tableNumberSum) AS tableNumberSum, SUM(yesterdayAllSum) AS yesterdayAllSum, SUM(adsSum) AS adsSum, SUM(odpsSum) AS odpsSum, SUM(adsSize) AS adsSize, SUM(odpsSize) AS odpsSize, SUM(averageAllDailySize) AS averageAllDailySize FROM ( SELECT mainClassify, IFNULL(primaryClassifyCh, '中间表') AS primaryClassifyCh, IFNULL(secondaryClassifyCh, '中间表') AS secondaryClassifyCh, tableAllSum, tableAllSize, averageAllDailyVolume, tableNumberSum, Statistics_Day, yesterdayAllSum, todayStr, adsSum, odpsSum, adsSize, odpsSize, averageAllDailySize FROM ( SELECT 'null' AS mainClassify, FACTOR_ONE_NAME AS primaryClassifyCh, FACTOR_TWO_NAME AS secondaryClassifyCh, SUM(table_all_count) AS tableAllSum, TRUNCATE(SUM(table_size) / 1073741824, 4) AS tableAllSize, SUM(AVERAGE_DAILY_VOLUME) / COUNT(*) AS averageAllDailyVolume, COUNT(*) AS tableNumberSum, SUM(YESTERDAY_COUNT) AS yesterdayAllSum, DATE_FORMAT(STATISTICS_TIME, '%Y%m%d') AS Statistics_Day, DATE_FORMAT(NOW(), '%Y%m%d') AS todayStr, SUM(CASE WHEN UPPER(table_type) = 'ADS' THEN table_all_count ELSE 0 END) AS adsSum, SUM(CASE WHEN UPPER(table_type) = 'ODPS' THEN table_all_count ELSE 0 END) AS odpsSum, TRUNCATE(SUM(CASE WHEN UPPER(table_type) = 'ADS' THEN table_size ELSE 0 END) / 1073741824, 4) AS adsSize, TRUNCATE(SUM(CASE WHEN UPPER(table_type) = 'ODPS' THEN table_size ELSE 0 END) / 1073741824, 4) AS odpsSize, CASE WHEN (SUM(CASE WHEN AVERAGE_DAILY_SIZE IS NULL THEN 0 ELSE AVERAGE_DAILY_SIZE END) / COUNT(*)) IS NULL THEN 0 WHEN (SUM(CASE WHEN AVERAGE_DAILY_SIZE IS NULL THEN 0 ELSE AVERAGE_DAILY_SIZE END) / COUNT(*)) / 1073741824 > 0 AND (SUM(CASE WHEN AVERAGE_DAILY_SIZE IS NULL THEN 0 ELSE AVERAGE_DAILY_SIZE END) / COUNT(*)) / 1073741824 < 0.01 THEN 0.01 ELSE TRUNCATE((SUM(CASE WHEN AVERAGE_DAILY_SIZE IS NULL THEN 0 ELSE AVERAGE_DAILY_SIZE END) / COUNT(*)) / 1073741824, 2) END AS averageAllDailySize FROM DP_TABLE_ORGANIZATION_ASSETS
STATISTICS_TIME >= DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 0 DAY) AND (PRIMARY_ORGANIZATION_CH IS NULL OR PRIMARY_ORGANIZATION_CH = '中间表') AND (SECONDARY_ORGANIZATION_CH IS NULL OR SECONDARY_ORGANIZATION_CH = '中间表') AND (PRIMARY_DATASOURCE_CH IS NULL OR PRIMARY_DATASOURCE_CH = '中间表') AND (SECONDARY_DATASOURCE_CH IS NULL OR SECONDARY_DATASOURCE_CH = '中间表') AND FACTOR_ONE_NAME IS NULL AND FACTOR_TWO_NAME IS NULL
GROUP BY FACTOR_ONE_NAME, FACTOR_TWO_NAME, DATE_FORMAT(STATISTICS_TIME, '%Y%m%d') ) t11 ) t12 GROUP BY ROLLUP(primaryClassifyCh, secondaryClassifyCh) HAVING CONCAT(primaryClassifyCh, secondaryClassifyCh) != '中间表' AND primaryClassifyCh IS NOT NULL AND ( CASE WHEN (primaryClassifyCh IS NULL AND secondaryClassifyCh IS NOT NULL) THEN '汇总' WHEN (primaryClassifyCh IS NOT NULL AND secondaryClassifyCh IS NULL) THEN '合计' ELSE secondaryClassifyCh END IS NOT NULL )

mapper.select: select distinct TABLE_TYPE || '->' || RES_NAME || '->' || TABLE_PROJECT as tableProject, update_period as updatePeriod, '' as productStage from (SELECT * FROM (SELECT j.*, row_number() over(PARTITION BY lower(TABLE_PROJECT), upper(TABLE_NAME_EN) ORDER BY STATISTICS_TIME DESC) as rnn from DP_TABLE_ORGANIZATION_ASSETS j where STATISTICS_TIME >= date(now() - interval #{daysAgo} day)) a ) h WHERE h.rnn = 1

select.if: select case when primary_name is null then '中间表' else primary_name end as primary_name, records, tableSize, tableNum from (select row_number() over(partition by primary_name order by statistics_day desc) rn, t.* from (select primary_organization_ch AS primary_name, round(sum(table_all_count) / 100000000, 6) as records, round(sum(table_size) / 1073741824, 4) as tableSize, date_format(statistics_time, '%Y%m%d') as statistics_day, count(*) as tableNum from DP_TABLE_ORGANIZATION_ASSETS where statistics_time >= date(now() - interval #{daysAgo} day) group by primary_organization_ch, date_format(statistics_time, '%Y%m%d')) t where t.primary_name is not null) t1 where rn = 1

select case when primary_name is null then '中间表' else primary_name end as primary_name, records, tableSize, tableNum from (select row_number() over(partition by primary_name order by statistics_day desc) rn, t.* from (select primary_datasource_ch AS primary_name, round(sum(table_all_count) / 100000000, 6) as records, round(sum(table_size) / 1073741824, 4) as tableSize, date_format(statistics_time, '%Y%m%d') as statistics_day, count(*) as tableNum from DP_TABLE_ORGANIZATION_ASSETS where statistics_time >= date(now() - interval #{daysAgo} day) group by primary_datasource_ch, date_format(statistics_time, '%Y%m%d')) t where t.primary_name is not null) t1 where rn = 1

select case when PRIMARY_NAME is NULL THEN '中间表' else PRIMARY_NAME end as PRIMARY_NAME , records , tableSize from( select row_number() over ( partition by PRIMARY_NAME order by STATISTICS_day desc ) rn ,t.* from( select FACTOR_ONE_NAME AS PRIMARY_NAME,round(sum(TABLE_ALL_COUNT)/100000000,6) as records , round(sum(table_size)/1073741824,4) as tableSize,date_format(STATISTICS_TIME,'%Y%m%d') as STATISTICS_day from DP_TABLE_ORGANIZATION_ASSETS where STATISTICS_TIME >= date(now() - interval #{daysAgo} day) group by FACTOR_ONE_NAME , date_format(STATISTICS_TIME,'%Y%m%d') ) t where t.PRIMARY_NAME is not null) t1 where rn =1

mapper.select: select distinct lower(project_name) from DP_DATA_STORAGE_ADD_TABLE

select DATABASE_TYPE as dataBaseType , PROJECT_NAME as projectName , TABLENAME_EN as tableNameEN , TABLENAME_CH as tableNameCH,PARTITIONED as partitioned,DATA_SOURCE_NAME as dataSourceName, DATA_SOURCE_ID as dataSourceId,DATA_CENTER_NAME as dataCenterName,DATA_CENTER_ID as dataCenterId, ISSTANDARD as isStandard,ISADDMONITOR as isAddMonitor,ISDELETE as isDelete, PARTITION_COLUMN as partitionColumn ,TABLE_ID AS tableUuid from DP_DATA_STORAGE_ADD_TABLE
ISDELETE = '0' and ISADDMONITOR = '已控'
and UPPER(DATABASE_TYPE) = upper(#{dataBaseType})
and (upper(TABLENAME_EN) LIKE upper('%'||#{tableName}||'%') or upper(TABLENAME_CH) LIKE upper('%'||#{tableName}||'%') or upper(PROJECT_NAME) LIKE upper('%'||#{tableName}||'%'))
SELECT DISTINCT TABLENAME,OBJECTNAME FROM synlte.OBJECT
mapper.update:
update DP_DATA_STORAGE_ADD_TABLE set ISADDMONITOR = '待控' where
(UPPER(DATA_SOURCE_ID) = UPPER(#{item.dataSourceId}) and UPPER(PROJECT_NAME) = UPPER(#{item.projectName}) and UPPER(TABLENAME_EN) = UPPER(#{item.tableNameEN}))
mapper.select: select lower(TABLE_PROJECT) as value, max(lower(TABLE_PROJECT))||'('||count(1)||')' as label from (SELECT TABLE_TYPE,TABLE_PROJECT FROM ( SELECT j.TABLE_TYPE,j.TABLE_PROJECT, row_number ( ) over ( PARTITION BY lower(TABLE_PROJECT), upper(TABLE_NAME_EN) ORDER BY STATISTICS_TIME DESC ) as rnn from DP_TABLE_ORGANIZATION_ASSETS j where STATISTICS_TIME >= date(now()) ) h WHERE h.rnn = 1) t where upper(TABLE_TYPE) = upper(#{stroageLocation}) group by upper(TABLE_TYPE),lower(TABLE_PROJECT) order by lower(TABLE_PROJECT)

SELECT TABLE_TYPE||'('||count(1)||')' as label,TABLE_TYPE as value FROM ( SELECT upper(j.TABLE_TYPE) as TABLE_TYPE, row_number ( ) over ( PARTITION BY lower(TABLE_PROJECT), upper(TABLE_NAME_EN) ORDER BY STATISTICS_TIME DESC ) as rnn from DP_TABLE_ORGANIZATION_ASSETS j where STATISTICS_TIME >= date(now()) and j.table_type is not null) h WHERE h.rnn = 1 group by TABLE_TYPE

select a.label||'('|| sum(case when b.table_name_en is not null then 1 else 0 end) ||')' as label ,a.value as value from (select labelname as label,substr(labelcode,0,1) as value from SYNLTE.LABELS group by labelname,substr(labelcode,0,1)) a left join (select labels,TABLE_NAME_EN from (SELECT j.labels,j.TABLE_NAME_EN, row_number ( ) over ( PARTITION BY lower(TABLE_PROJECT), upper(TABLE_NAME_EN) ORDER BY STATISTICS_TIME DESC ) as rnn from DP_TABLE_ORGANIZATION_ASSETS j where STATISTICS_TIME >= date(now()) ) h WHERE h.rnn = 1) b on b.labels like '%'||a.value||'%' GROUP BY a.value,a.label ORDER BY value

select '启用' as value, '启用('||count(1)||')' as label FROM ( SELECT j.OBJECT_STATE, row_number ( ) over ( PARTITION BY lower(TABLE_PROJECT), upper(TABLE_NAME_EN) ORDER BY STATISTICS_TIME DESC ) as rnn from DP_TABLE_ORGANIZATION_ASSETS j where STATISTICS_TIME >= date(now() - interval #{daysAgo} day) ) h WHERE h.rnn = 1 and OBJECT_STATE in('0','1') union select '停用' as value, '停用('||count(1)||')' as label FROM ( SELECT j.OBJECT_STATE, row_number ( ) over ( PARTITION BY lower(TABLE_PROJECT), upper(TABLE_NAME_EN) ORDER BY STATISTICS_TIME DESC ) as rnn from DP_TABLE_ORGANIZATION_ASSETS j where STATISTICS_TIME >= date(now() - interval #{daysAgo} day) ) h WHERE h.rnn = 1 and (OBJECT_STATE = '-1' or OBJECT_STATE is null ) union select '已注册' as value, '已注册('||count(1)||')' as label FROM ( SELECT j.REGISTER_STATE, row_number ( ) over ( PARTITION BY lower(TABLE_PROJECT), upper(TABLE_NAME_EN) ORDER BY STATISTICS_TIME DESC ) as rnn from DP_TABLE_ORGANIZATION_ASSETS j where STATISTICS_TIME >= date(now() - interval #{daysAgo} day)) h WHERE h.rnn = 1 and REGISTER_STATE = '1' union select '未注册' as value, '未注册('||count(1)||')' as label FROM ( SELECT j.REGISTER_STATE, row_number ( ) over ( PARTITION BY lower(TABLE_PROJECT), upper(TABLE_NAME_EN) ORDER BY STATISTICS_TIME DESC ) as rnn from DP_TABLE_ORGANIZATION_ASSETS j where STATISTICS_TIME >= date(now() - interval #{daysAgo} day)) h WHERE h.rnn = 1 and (REGISTER_STATE != '1' or REGISTER_STATE is null )
select upper(TABLE_TYPE) from DP_TABLE_ORGANIZATION_ASSETS where STATISTICS_TIME >= date(now() - interval #{daysAgo} day) group by upper(TABLE_TYPE)

select SJXJBM as tableId,TABLE_NAME_EN as tableNameEn,OBJECT_ID as objectId,APPROVAL_ID as approvalId, APPROVAL_STATUS as approvalStatus,APPROVAL_CREATE_TIME as approvalCreateTime,APPROVAL_UPDATE_TIME as approvalUpdateTime from DP_DATA_REGISTER where APPROVAL_STATUS = '2'

select APPROVAL_ID as approvalId, case when STATUS = '3' then '3' when STATUS = '4' then '-1' ELSE '2' end as approvalStatus from DGN_APPROVAL where STATUS in ('1','2','3','4') and
APPROVAL_ID = #{item.approvalId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}

select distinct SJXJBM as tableid, case when DATARESOURCE_CODE is null then #{resourceCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR} else DATARESOURCE_CODE end as symbol from ( SELECT j.*, row_number ( ) over ( PARTITION BY lower( TABLE_PROJECT ), upper( TABLE_NAME_EN ) ORDER BY STATISTICS_TIME DESC ) AS rnn FROM DP_TABLE_ORGANIZATION_ASSETS j where STATISTICS_TIME >= date(now() - interval #{daysAgo} day) ) h WHERE h.rnn = 1 and (
h.SJXJBM = #{tableId,jdbcType=VARCHAR} )

select case when STATUS = '3' then 3 when STATUS = '4' then -1 ELSE 2 end as approvalStatus from DGN_APPROVAL where APPROVAL_ID in( select APPROVAL_ID from DP_DATA_REGISTER where SJXJBM = #{tableId,jdbcType=VARCHAR} )
select OBJECTNAME from SYNLTE.OBJECT where RELATE_TABLENAME = 'OBJECTFIELD' and upper(TABLENAME) = upper(#{tableName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}) and rownum=1
select upper(TABLENAME) as TABLENAME,OBJECTNAME from SYNLTE.OBJECT

select.if:
select * from( select '' as primaryClassifyId, t1.PRIMARY_ORGANIZATION_CH as primaryClassifyCh, '' AS secondaryClassifyId, t1.SECONDARY_ORGANIZATION_CH as secondaryClassifyCh, -- 二级分类中文名 '' as threeClassifyId, t1.THREELEVEL_ORGANIZATION_CH as threeClassifyCh, t1.SJXJBM || '_' || TABLE_TYPE || '_' || RES_NAME || '_' || TABLE_PROJECT as tableId, -- 表id t1.TABLE_NAME_EN as tableNameEn, -- 表英文名 t1.NAME aS tableNameCh, -- 表中文名 t1.STATISTICS_TIME AS INSERT_DATE from( select * FROM ( SELECT j.*, row_number ( ) over ( PARTITION BY lower(TABLE_PROJECT), upper(TABLE_NAME_EN) ORDER BY STATISTICS_TIME DESC ) as rnn from DP_TABLE_ORGANIZATION_ASSETS j where STATISTICS_TIME >= date(now() - interval #{daysAgo} day) and PRIMARY_ORGANIZATION_CH!='中间表' and SECONDARY_ORGANIZATION_CH!='中间表' ) h WHERE h.rnn = 1 ) t1) t2
where (primaryClassifyCh like '%'||#{name}||'%' or secondaryClassifyCh like '%'||#{name}||'%'or upper(tableNameCh) like upper('%'||#{name}||'%') or upper(tableNameEn) like upper('%'||#{name}||'%') or upper(tableId) like upper('%'||#{name}||'%'))

select * from( select '' as primaryClassifyId, t1.PRIMARY_DATASOURCE_CH as primaryClassifyCh, '' AS secondaryClassifyId, t1.SECONDARY_DATASOURCE_CH as secondaryClassifyCh, -- 二级分类中文名 t1.SJXJBM || '_' || TABLE_TYPE || '_' || RES_NAME || '_' || TABLE_PROJECT as tableId, -- 表id t1.TABLE_NAME_EN as tableNameEn, -- 表英文名 t1.NAME aS tableNameCh, -- 表中文名 t1.STATISTICS_TIME AS INSERT_DATE from( select * FROM ( SELECT j.*, row_number ( ) over ( PARTITION BY lower(TABLE_PROJECT), upper(TABLE_NAME_EN) ORDER BY STATISTICS_TIME DESC ) as rnn from DP_TABLE_ORGANIZATION_ASSETS j where STATISTICS_TIME >= date(now() - interval #{daysAgo} day) and PRIMARY_DATASOURCE_CH!='中间表' and SECONDARY_DATASOURCE_CH!='中间表') h WHERE h.rnn = 1 ) t1) t2
where (primaryClassifyCh like '%'||#{name}||'%' or secondaryClassifyCh like '%'||#{name}||'%'or upper(tableNameCh) like upper('%'||#{name}||'%') or upper(tableNameEn) like upper('%'||#{name}||'%') or upper(tableId) like upper('%'||#{name}||'%'))

select SJYJFL as primaryClassifyId, --- 一级分类代码 PRIMARYORGANIZATIONCH as primaryClassifyCh, --- 一级分类中文 SJEJFL as secondaryClassifyId, -- 二级分类代码 case when SECONDARYORGANIZATIONCH is null then '中间表' else SECONDARYORGANIZATIONCH end as secondaryClassifyCh, -- 二级分类中文名 SJXJBM as tableId, -- 表id TABLENAME as tableNameEn, -- 表英文名 NAME as tableNameCh, -- 表中文名 INSERT_DATE from classify_interface_all_date where PRIMARYORGANIZATIONCH is not null and SJXJBM is not null
and (PRIMARYORGANIZATIONCH like '%'||#{name}||'%' or SECONDARYORGANIZATIONCH like '%'||#{name}||'%'or upper(NAME) like upper('%'||#{name}||'%') or upper(TABLENAME) like upper('%'||#{name}||'%') or upper(SJXJBM) like upper('%'||#{name}||'%'))
GROUP BY SJYJFL,PRIMARYORGANIZATIONCH,SJEJFL,SECONDARYORGANIZATIONCH,SJXJBM,TABLENAME,NAME,INSERT_DATE order by INSERT_DATE desc

select SJLYYJ as primaryClassifyId, --- 一级分类代码 PRIMARYDATASOURCECH as primaryClassifyCh, --- 一级分类中文 SJLYEJ as secondaryClassifyId, -- 二级分类代码 case when SECONDARYDATASOURCECH is null then '中间表' else SECONDARYDATASOURCECH end as secondaryClassifyCh, -- 二级分类中文名 SJXJBM as tableId, -- 表id TABLENAME as tableNameEn, -- 表英文名 NAME as tableNameCh, -- 表中文名 INSERT_DATE from classify_interface_all_date where PRIMARYDATASOURCECH is not null and SJXJBM is not null
and (PRIMARYDATASOURCECH like '%'||#{name}||'%' or SECONDARYDATASOURCECH like '%'||#{name}||'%'or upper(NAME) like upper('%'||#{name}||'%') or upper(TABLENAME) like upper('%'||#{name}||'%') or upper(SJXJBM) like upper('%'||#{name}||'%'))
GROUP BY SJLYYJ,PRIMARYDATASOURCECH,SJLYEJ,SECONDARYDATASOURCECH,SJXJBM,TABLENAME,NAME,INSERT_DATE order by INSERT_DATE desc

mapper.delete: delete from DP_ZC_CONFIG_FIELD_CONTROL where name = 'TABLE_ORGANIZATION' and username = #{userName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}
mapper.select: select SHOW_FIELD_LIST from DP_ZC_CONFIG_FIELD_CONTROL where NAME='TABLE_ORGANIZATION' and USERNAME = #{userName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}
